title: 133-gene constitutive sex-biased cortical signature
description: 133 genes (119 autosomal, 14 sex chromosome) show consistent sex-biased expression across all six cortical regions and all cell types. Any neuropsychiatric model ignoring this signature operates on incomplete measurement.

measurement_vectors.label: autosomal_constitutive
measurement_vectors.source: single-cell RNA-seq, 6 cortical regions, all cell types
